SUPPLEMENTAL BRIEF IS NOT TO EXCEED 3 PAGES AND SHALL BE FILED NO LATER THAN JANUARY 14, 2026. JUDGE: ANTHONY A. TRENDACOSTA; CLERK: K. VALDES; NOT REPORTED. (D501)

REAL PROPERTY/HOUSING MOTION 501, PLAINTIFF CAMILA BIANCHI, LIAM CUMMING, KATHARINA CAMPOS MOTION TO ENFORCE SETTLEMENT IS DENIED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. MOVING PAPERS FAILED TO CITE ANY AUTHORITY FOR THE PROPOSITION THAT A JUDGEMENT PURSUANT TO CCP 664.6 MAY BE ENTERED AGAINST AN INDIVIDUAL WHO HAS NOT APPEARED IN THE ACTION/HAD BEEN DEFAULTED. THE COURT PROVIDED PLAINTIFF AN OPPORTUNITY TO SUBMIT SUPPLEMENTAL BRIEFING TO ADDRESS COURT'S ABILITY TO ENTER A JUDGMENT BASED ON A BREACH OF A STIPULATION AGAINST A PERSON WHO HAS NOT MADE AN APPEARANCE IN THE ACTION, MR. BACKUS. SUPPLEMENTAL BRIEFING IS DEVOID OF ANY AUTHORITY ALLOWING FOR SUCH JUDGMENT. THE COURT NOTES THAT MR. BACKUS HAS BEEN DEFAULTED IN THIS ACTION; AND FOLLOWING A DEFAULT CANNOT MAKE AN APPEARANCE WITHOUT SAID DEFAULT HAVING BEEN FIRST SET ASIDE.PREVAILING PARTY TO SUBMIT PROPOSED ORDER THAT IS IN COMPLIANCE WITH CRC 3.1312(B).JUDGE: CHARLES F. HAINES; CLERK: K. VALDES; NOT REPORTED. (D501)

calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion And Motion To Enforce Settlement
Off Calendar Jan-23-2026 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances
Michele Ellson, Esq. appearing for Plaintiff Camile De Andrade Bianchi
Christine Tour-Sarkissian, Esq. appearaing fro Defendant Valerie McCarthy

Hearing held.
Arguments made and heard.

The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF CAMILA BIANCHI, LIAM CUMMING, KATHARINA CAMPOS Motion To Enforce Settlement

is DENIED without prejudice. Moving papers failed to cite any authority for the proposition that a judgement pursuant to CCP 664.6 may be entered against an individual who has not appeared in the action/had been defaulted. The Court provided Plaintiff an opportunity to submit supplemental briefing to address Court's ability to enter a judgment based on a breach of a stipulation against a person who has not made an appearance in the action, Mr. Backus. Supplemental briefing is devoid of any authority allowing for such judgment. The Court notes that Mr. Backus has been defaulted in this action; and following a default cannot make an appearance without said default having been first set aside.

Prevailing Party to submit proposed order that is in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b).

Judge: Charles F. Haines; Clerk: K. Valdes; Not Reported. (D501)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Enforce Settlement
Off Calendar Dec-08-2025 Continued To Jan-23-26 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, tentative ruling adopted as follows:

PLAINTIFF Motion To Enforce Settlement;

is continued to January 23, 2026 for supplemental briefing to address (1) personal service of Summons and Complaint on Robert McCarthy on September 19, 2023. According to the Settlement Agreement Robert McCarthy passed away in May 2023; (2) Court's jurisdiction to enter a judgment pursuant to CCP 664.6 against persons/entities who have not made an appearance in this action, Robert Bakus and Estate of Robert McCarthy. Supplemental brief is not to exceed 3 pages and shall be filed no later than January 14, 2026.

Judge: Anthony A. Trendacosta; Clerk: K. Valdes; Not Reported. (D501)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Enforce Settlement Agreement And Memorandum Of Points And Authorities In Support Of Motion
Off Calendar Sep-22-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: PLAINTIFFS' MOTION TO ENFORCE SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT

No appearances. The court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: DENIED. There is no competent evidence of breach; Plaintiff's only evidence is counsel's conclusory statement that "Defendants did not make the June 1, 2025 payment or the July 1, 2025 payment[.]" (Ellson Decl. 10). Declarations filed on August 21, 2025 (40 minutes before the original hearing date) are stricken and not considered. No authority provided to support timeliness and procedural propriety of such filings. Prevailing party to submit a proposed form of order in compliance with CRC 3.1312. Judge: Charles F. Haines, Clerk: E. Larnauti, Not Reported (501/CFH)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Enforce Settlement Agreement And Memorandum Of Points And Authorities In Support Of Motion
Off Calendar Aug-21-2025 Continued To Sep-22-25 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES: PLAINTIFFS' MOTION TO ENFORCE SETTLEMENT

Appearances: Michele Ellson of Open Door Legal (415.520.7551) for plaintiff and moving party; Phil Foster of the Tour-Sarkissian Law Offices (415.626.7744) for defendant and responding party.

The court notes there is a supplemental filing on behalf of plaintiff that was filed this morning. On agreement of the parties, the matter is continued to September 22, 2025. Counsel waive notice. Judge: Charles F. Haines, Clerk: E. Larnauti, Not Reported (501/CFH)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Enforce Settlement And Memorandum Of Points And Authorities In Support Of Motion

PLAINTIFFs CAMILA BIANCHI, LIAM CUMMING,and KATHARINA CAMPOS' Motion To Enforce Settlement.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/JMQ)
